overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban street at dusk. The scene features palm-lined streets, a massive cylindrical holographic billboard, and a contrast between rundown residential shacks and futuristic skyscrapers in the background.

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and moving onto the sidewalk, heading away from the gas station

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving through the intersection
pedestrian walking on the opposite sidewalk near the gas station

entered.detail: low commercial building with green neon trim and flat roof
tall palm trees lining the street against the dusk sky
crisscrossing electrical wires and utility poles
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at an urban intersection during dusk, with a green-roofed gas station visible on the left. The character crosses the asphalt road and steps onto the sidewalk, passing under a network of power lines. Sparse traffic moves through the intersection as the character transitions from the open street to the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk approaching large holographic advertisement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward a large cylindrical billboard structure

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive cylindrical tower structure with rotating holographic advertisements
weathered wooden fencing along residential properties
green dumpsters lined up on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk, the character approaches a massive cylindrical holographic billboard that dominates the view ahead. The street is lined with palm trees on the left and wooden fences on the right, with rundown residential shacks visible behind the fencing. The futuristic city skyline remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk passing large advertisement structure with accumulated trash

events.description: shirtless pedestrian passes close to the camera temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking past the large holographic billboard and accumulated trash bags on the left side

notable_agents.action: shirtless man in red pants walking toward and past the camera
group of pedestrians walking away from the camera down the sidewalk

entered.detail: piled blue and white garbage bags next to the dumpsters
small wooden houses with corrugated metal roofs and weathered siding

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the massive cylindrical billboard which now looms large on the left, displaying bright holographic advertisements. Blue trash bags are piled near green dumpsters on the sidewalk edge. The character passes a shirtless pedestrian and continues past rundown residential shacks on the right, with the city skyline still visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street continuing toward downtown district

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the billboard area, approaching more pedestrians in the distance

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail structure spanning the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving past the billboard area, the character continues down the residential sidewalk with the large cylindrical structure now behind. The street stretches ahead toward an overpass bridge in the distance, with the futuristic downtown skyline becoming more prominent. Residential shacks line the right side while palm trees continue along the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dystopian urban street at dusk, transitioning from a mundane intersection into a corridor of stark contrast between futuristic technology and urban decay. It begins at a road crossing by a green-roofed gas station, moving under a network of power lines as the character steps from the asphalt onto the concrete sidewalk. As the camera advances, the view is dominated by a massive cylindrical holographic billboard that looms over a street lined with palm trees and rundown residential shacks. The scene then shifts as the character passes blue trash bags and pedestrians in the shadow of the glowing advertisements, while the futuristic city skyline grows more distinct in the background. Finally, the camera moves past the billboard area and continues down the residential path toward a distant overpass bridge, with the towering downtown skyscrapers becoming the central focus of the horizon.
